title: German-Canadian Wrap
description: A flavorful German-inspired wrap filled with Canadian ingredients and a spicy twist. Enjoy as a snack or lunch.

ingredients.name: Canadian zesty mustard
ingredients.notes: add more or less to taste

instructions: Spread 2 tbsp of Canadian zesty mustard evenly across the center of the wrap.
Add 4 oz of spicy Canadian bacon on top of the mustard.
Add 1 cup of lettuce, 1 cup of sliced tomato, and 1/4 cup of thinly sliced pickles on top of the bacon.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
Slice in half and serve immediately.
Optional: Add additional ingredients, such as avocado or cheese, to suit your taste.
